title: Senior Software Engineer - Capital Float - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Capital Float - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Join the Capital Float family as a Senior Software Engineer in Vadodara. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Capital Float:
Capital Float is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Capital Float!
